D:\Cmake\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\self_compiler_cli.dir/objects.a
D:\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\self_compiler_cli.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\self_compiler_cli.dir\objects1.rsp
D:\mingw64\bin\c++.exe -g -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\self_compiler_cli.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o self_compiler_cli.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libself_compiler_cli.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\self_compiler_cli.dir\linkLibs.rsp
